UTILIB: A Utility Library for Portable C/C++ Software

Version 2.0

William E. Hart
Discrete Mathematics and Algorithms Dept
Sandia National Laboratories
P.O. Box 5800
Albuquerque, NM
http://www.cs.sandia.gov/~wehart
wehart@sandia.gov

This document describes the UTILIB software library. UTILIB includes a variety of generic components for C++ software development including abstract data types, I/O management, sorting routines, and random number generators. The UTILIB library has been used by several software projects at Sandia, including DAKOTA, PICO, SGOPT, Coliny and NETV.
